hotel_name: FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc (FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc)

reviews.title: Wonderful resort place
reviews.text: Just 40km from Hanoi, the scenery is beautiful, the staff is attentive, and there is a diverse entertainment space with 9 pickleball courts, a swimming pool, and an outdoor cinema. A wonderful quiet space for families.

reviews.title: Do not ever stay at FLC Vinh Phuc if you don't want to get mentally disturbed.
reviews.positives:
Only good thing here was a breakfast. And yeah, the F&B manager was kind enough to come and apologize on next day for bad food and services.
My stay was 4th Nov to 6th Nov but i shortened it and left FLC on 5th Nov 2023.
reviews.negatives:
Location is good but not maintained properly. I shortened my trip from two days to one day and they didn't refunded me for second night even after they were wrong. 
1) Room, dirty and poor quality toilet with water dropping from the ceiling and toilet flush was not working properly. Photo attached. 
2) Wardrobe is broken inside, ply came out of the wardrobe, doesn't sounds like a resort but a poor quality one star guest house. 
3) Sandwich was served stale quality with a dirty napkin. Returned it and got charged for it. Napkin Photo attached. 
4) Hot Chocolate was worst (i paid for it)
5) Billiards cue sticks are without tips so unable to play
6) Ecofarm closed, so no activities. 
7) Fish Pond closed, can't visit. 
8) Bird farm moved and closed too
9) Golf we requested to play two times, no one responded to help us.
10) Hard mattresses, not easy to sleep. Got backpain after one night stay.
How they says FLC is a luxurious resort? It's worst! Do not ever plan to come here. I booked for two nights and left after one night stay so you can understand the quality of their rooms, food and services

reviews.title: The satisfaction level for the price is good.
reviews.text: The accommodation and free breakfast are really good for the price. There are several facilities available on-site, but the facilities are a bit outdated, and the location is a bit ambiguous, so there aren't many enjoyable options around apart from the accommodation facilities.

reviews.title: It has a really nice view and it is peaceful but they need to improve their customer service.
reviews.positives: The place is nice
reviews.negatives: They need to improve their customer service especially in the restaurant. It is so difficult to get the attention of the staff in the restaurant and they are frowning when you call them.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good.

reviews.negatives: Bad pingpong, bia

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The price is very reasonable, the location is a bit hidden, the room is quite clean, the staff are fine but the security is a bit lacking in directing customers on parking, as they speak not very politely, the amenities are okay.

reviews.title: passez cette étape sans regret. L'apparence du luxe n'excuse pas la froideur des  lieux
reviews.positives: Le calme
reviews.negatives: Beaucoup d'activités fermées, Golf, pub à 18h????? Rappelez les fondamentaux de l'HYGIENE au personnel!!!! Le personnel est inexperimenté et non formé

reviews.title: KS is suitable for families.
reviews.text: My family really enjoys being here, all the departments from the spa to the reception are very enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Mehr Schein als Sein
reviews.positives: Gepflegte Anlage. Gute Auswahl beim Frühstückebuffet.
reviews.negatives:
Der Service im Restaurant war schlecht. Man fühlte sich vom Personal angestarrt & nicht verstanden - auf keiner Art. 
Keine vegetarischen Optionen - auf Nachfrage und vielem hin und her wurde uns Reis mit Grünkohl serviert - war in Ordnung.

reviews.title: A memorable trip to FLC Vinh Phuc.
reviews.text: My family had a wonderful vacation at FLC Vĩnh Phúc. The staff here is very helpful regardless of the time. The amenities are complete, clean, and the breakfast is delicious. The only point that needs improvement is the wifi, as it is relatively weak here.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Camera spaziosissima e tutto ben curato.
Non c'era il buffet essendo fuori stagione ma scelta su ordinazione.
reviews.negatives:
Personale anche della reception che non parlava inglese. 
Bollitore in camera da utilizzare appoggiato a terra poiché le prese non davano modo di tenerlo sul mobiletto.

reviews.title: Family and 2 children
reviews.text:
Pros:
1. Reasonably priced for this area since it's quite old.
2. Friendly and pleasant staff.
3. The restaurant's lunch and dinner set meals are quite tasty and reasonably priced.
4. Spacious, clean swimming pool.
5. The children's play area is old but very spacious, in general, the kids can still have fun in it.
6. The bungalow rooms are spacious and well-equipped, and the bathrooms are also large.

Cons:
1. There are too many mosquitoes. It's best to bring mosquito repellent. If there are infants, it's advisable to buy specific mosquito repellent for babies.
2. The rooms are a bit dim and quite stuffy. It might be good to bring a rechargeable fan to alleviate the stuffiness as the bedding is quite cramped.
3. The children's play area is quite outdated.
4. The coffee at the preparation area is terrible, smells only of milk. It's not even as good as making it at home.
5. There are no decent shopping or restaurant facilities nearby.

reviews.title: A reasonable trip with the family.

Everything is fine. Although the resort is old, everything is still well maintained. The billiard table needs cleaning.

reviews.title: The prices are very reasonable.
reviews.text: My family is quite satisfied with the resort's service. The rooms are spacious, clean, and comfortable (but there are a few too many mosquitoes). The indoor and outdoor pools are clean, and the children's playground is cool. The gym has a broken treadmill that stops working after a few minutes. The breakfast isn't too diverse, but it is delicious. The à la carte food is reasonably priced and tasty.

reviews.title: The prices are cheap but the service is excellent.
reviews.text: The family stayed at FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc from July 5 to July 6, 2024. Our impressions of the resort are as follows: 1) The room rates are cheap; 2) The rooms are spacious and beautiful; 3) The staff is very enthusiastic and quickly calls for electric cars; 4) There is a large, cool play area with a variety of activities including outdoor cinema, billiards, outdoor swimming pool, and many other services; 5) The food is very delicious and just right. Our family will return for a stay.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Các căn nhà mình ở phía trong hệ thống thoát nước hơi kém.

reviews.text: Affordable price, spacious rooms, plenty of greenery, friendly and enthusiastic staff, provided with 30 golf practice balls, few guests, but the area is a bit small, few games for children, and the playhouse has a slight odor.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ok

reviews.title: Excellent Stay!
reviews.text:
Amazing bed, I slept like a baby.  Overall, great place to get away.

The facilities do need a bit of maintenance though, and I guess due to low number of guests, some dishes on the restaurant menu weren't available and breakfast was order to table rather than a buffet.

reviews.title: I felt not comfortable to stay, sorry!
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Restaurant closed before 8pm & street lamp not function. Felt unsafe to walk around.

reviews.title: Very good for the price range.
reviews.text: I just came back and was very pleased, I went at a time with low ratings so it was quite empty. The staff were all very enthusiastic and approachable, everything was almost perfect, just a bit regrettable that time has caused everything to deteriorate. But with this price, it's absolutely fine, I wish FLC Vinh Phuc would become more crowded, thanks Agoda for being a reliable partner for this trip.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Reasonable prices, conveniently located just 1 hour from downtown Hanoi. Friendly and polite staff. Suitable for families looking to relax in a quiet atmosphere. The only downside is that the movie room with three screens had a malfunction, so everyone had to leave because it hurt their eyes.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Resort rất nhiều cây xanh, bể bơi rất đẹp, khung cảnh lãng mạn, thanh bình, nhân viên cực kỳ nhiệt tình và nhã nhặn. Đây là một khu nghỉ dưỡng hết sức phù hợp cho một gia đình gồm ba thế hệ như nhà mình.
reviews.response:
Thưa anh Phan ,

FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc cảm ơn anh Phan đã đến trải nghiệm dịch vụ và đem về sự hài lòng. Lời nhận xét chân thành của anh đã tiếp thêm động lực cho đội ngũ cán bộ nhân viên đang làm việc tại FLC Vĩnh Phúc nỗ lực ngày đêm để đem đến những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tới khách hàng. FLC Vĩnh Phúc hy vọng anh Phan sẽ lan tỏa sự hài lòng của mình tới người thân, bạn bè để khu nghỉ dưỡng có cơ hội được đem niềm vui thích tới nhiều khách hàng hơn nữa.

Trân trọng,
FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc

reviews.title: Stable with the price
reviews.text: I went on Tuesday, and the resort was quiet and empty with just a few couples, the staff were friendly, the rooms were clean, and the breakfast was a bit sparse, probably due to the few guests. Overall, everything was very decent for this price range.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Reasonable for relaxation.
reviews.text: The resort is isolated from the residential area. Suitable for relaxation. When I went on the weekend, it was quite empty. The staff were nice and friendly. On the first day, there were few customers for breakfast, so we chose from limited options; the next day, on Sunday, there were many dishes for breakfast, quite delicious. It is suitable for family vacations. There is a swimming pool and a children's play area. There are no other entertainment places or shops around.
reviews.response:
Thưa anh Đăng,
FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc xin chân thành cảm ơn anh Đăng đã lưu trú và đóng góp xây dựng cho khu nghỉ dưỡng. Biết ơn đánh giá khách quan của anh đến khu nghỉ dưỡng để giúp FLC Vĩnh Phúc có thể ngày một phát triển hơn. Khu nghỉ dưỡng hy vọng anh Đăng cùng gia đình sẽ sớm quay lại để tận hưởng những trải nghiệm một cách tuyệt vời hơn!
Trân trọng,
FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc

reviews.title: No buffet
reviews.text:
They do what ever it takes to save money result
Poor experience for visitors
reviews.response:
Dear Sir,
We would like to have an apology because of not meeting your requirement yet. As same as most of 5 star hotels around the world, we serve breakfast by buffet, semi-buffet or serve at guests’ table due to number of guests that is announced in advance. In FLC Vinh Phuc, with more than 70 guests, full buffet is opened. When number of guests is between 30 and 70, semi-buffet is applied that means some dishes are set up around restaurant’s counters and some other hot dishes are served at guests’ table as their order. When number of guests is less than 30, we still serve full dishes as full buffet although we do not set up dishes on the counters. Guests order what they want in a menu and we serve at their table. During your stay, number of guests were in the third circumstance so we served you at your table that might make you feel not meet your requirement. We would like to thank your review and hope you come back at a more crowded day to join a full buffet.
Best Regards,
F.O.M

reviews.title: No complaints!
reviews.text: Everything was perfect for me and my wife for a short relaxing getaway from Hanoi!
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Lauri,
We would like to thank your sincere review that uplift our working spirit that motivate us to widespread satisfaction to many more guests come here. We remember you with a lovely smile always that make people around a perfect day! We are looking forward to serving you soon.
Best Regards,
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: ok
reviews.text: ăn uống bất cập giữa khách out và in
reviews.response:
Thưa anh Le,
FLC Luxury Resort Vĩnh Phúc cảm ơn anh Le đã đến lưu trú và để lại đánh giá rất cao về tổng quan các yếu tố chất lượng dịch vụ, nhân sự, cơ sở vật chất, cảnh quan. Với phản ánh của anh Le về ăn uống bất cập giữa khách out và khách in, khu nghỉ dưỡng đã có thông tin tới quý khách hàng ngày hôm đó do công suất của nhà hàng có hạn mà lượng khách tăng đột biến gồm cả khách out và khách in nên để đảm bảo khách hàng có chỗ ngồi thoải mái thì nhà hàng xin phép phục vụ những bữa ăn phát sinh vào 13h. Mùa hè này FLC Luxury Resort sẽ đưa vào vận hành giai đoạn 2 với nhà hàng mới đảm bảo đáp ứng sự yêu mến của nhiều quý khách hơn nữa. Khu nghỉ dưỡng mong được đón gia đình anh Le vào dịp đó để gia đình có trải nghiệm trọn vẹn hơn.
Trân trọng,
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Good family resort for the weekend get-a-way
reviews.text:
This resort is located near Hanoi city and easy to get by the car.
Pity that the indoor swimming pool was not really clean. The people using the pool did not take the shower before getting into the pool and the staff seems like not caring about it...
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. D.H,

On behalf of our team of FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc, we would like to apologize for not coming up to your standards and not taking care of you as we had promised. We sincerely would train ourselves better and work harder to maintain the promise of five star standards. Please accept our heartfelt and sincere apology! And hope we can serve you soon in a better fashion. Thank you!

Your Sincerely,

Assistant Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Excellent resort
reviews.text: I had great time in FLc Luxury Resort.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Vu,

On behalf of the entire team of FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc, we would like to say a big thank you for giving us a good rating and leaving good reviews. This helps us in uplifting the spirits of our team members who work tirelessly to make sure that all of our guests receive the best services possible. Hope to see you soon and serve you even better! Thank you!

Your Sincerely,

Assistant Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Worth your money
reviews.text: A good place to get away the city for 2 3 days, especially if you travel with small kids. My family spent a night at the resort. Not much of sightseeing but child-friendly facilities such as pools, small zoo, kid zones really made up for that.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Vu,

On behalf of the entire team of FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc, we would like to say a big thank you for giving us a good rating and leaving good reviews. This helps us in uplifting the spirits of our team members who work tirelessly to make sure that all of our guests receive the best services possible. Hope to see you soon and serve you even better!

Sincerely,

Thank you!

Assistant Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Very friendly and professional staff. Room was great and the price was amazing. Google maps has difficulty finding this place and the wifi was a bit slow, but other than that this was a great value for the money and a very nice hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Phillip!
On behalf of the entire team of FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc, we would like to say a big thank you for giving us a good rating and leaving good reviews. This helps us in uplifting the spirits of our team members who work tirelessly to make sure that all of our guests receive the best services possible. We are going to correct positioning of our resort on Google Map and boost WIFI speed to meet guests' demand. Hope to see you soon and serve you even better! Thank you!
Sincerely,
Assistant Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Interesting place near Hanoi but buffet is not good
reviews.text:
Resort is green and quiet, suitable for children. Kid club is ok. Indoor swimming pool is too small and not airy, but outdoor pool is beautiful, not too deep so that all family can play together. 
Dinner buffet is not worthy compared to price but no restaurant nearby the resort!
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Phuong,

Thank you for your love about beautiful, peaceful landscape and facilities as well. What a pity because you did not enjoy buffet because of its price. Actually we usually serve organic food from our farm. Although its cost is often a little higher, it brings guests a healthy meal. Beside buffet, we also serve a la carte or set menu with various of food and price choice thus we wish you come back soon for your children to breath fresh air, swim together and taste other delicious food with affordable price.

Best Regards,

Assistant Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Deserve to stay 1 night for family
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Thi,

Thank you for your love to FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc. Wish you usually have happy time with your family and hope you come back to us soon.

From FLC with love!

reviews.title: Excelent Service
reviews.text: We had good time with family and children, nice service  especially with the restaurant and the outdoor pool. The staff was friendly. We will comeback.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Tran,

How kind you are when you assess FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc with lovely words. You made our day with your comment when informing us that we served your family with excellent service. Your kind evaluation is a huge motivation for us to always try our best to bring joyfulness to more and more guests. Hope you and your family come back soon.

Best Regards,

From FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc with love!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff are super friendly and helpful, they showed that they care about customers not just they do because they have to do it. I  had a wonderful and unforgettable birthday here when I got an unexpectedly beautiful birthday cake, the breakfast was great. I will surely come back here  and already recommended this place for some many friends of mine :D.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Bich,

How kind you are when you assess FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc with lovely words. You made our day with your comment when informing us that we served your family with excellent service and unforgettable memory in your birthday. Your kind evaluation is a huge motivation for us to always try our best to bring joyfulness to more and more guests. Hope you and your family always choose us for your celebration in the future.

Best Regards,

From FLC Luxury Resort Vinh Phuc with love!
